title: New Graphene Method Part 2 - Making The Graphene
description: This is part of my indiegogo campain at https://www.indiegogo.com/projects/conductive-ink/x/6747865 - It is based on the paper 'mild sonichemical exfoliation of bromine intercalated graphite: a new route towards graphene' by Widenkvist et al if you want to look it up
